title: Nanorrhinum cabulicum
taxonomy: Nanorrhinum cabulicum belongs to the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the plantain or snailseed family. It is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Afghanistan. Within the Plantaginaceae family, Nanorrhinum cabulicum is classified under the genus Nanorrhinum. This genus is further divided into several species of flowering plants, all of which are native to Afghanistan and surrounding regions. The classification of Nanorrhinum cabulicum is an example of the complex and evolving nature of plant taxonomy.
